questionHtml: Suggest one undesirable consequence of cross-pollination involving glyphosate resistant crop plants with other plants.
markschemeHtml:
transfer of resistance genes to non-transgenic/organic crops
OR
transfer of resistance genes to wild relatives/development of weed resistance ✔
